ddls:
CREATE TABLE "agricultural_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., AL, AK) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data (e.g., state, county) */,
  "total_exports" REAL /* Total value of agricultural exports in millions of dollars */,
  "beef" REAL /* Total value of beef exports in millions of dollars */,
  "pork" REAL /* Total value of pork exports in millions of dollars */,
  "poultry" REAL /* Total value of poultry exports in millions of dollars */,
  "dairy" REAL /* Total value of dairy exports in millions of dollars */,
  "fruits_fresh" REAL /* Total value of fresh fruits exports in millions of dollars */,
  "fruits_processed" REAL /* Total value of processed fruits exports in millions of dollars */,
  "total_fruits" REAL /* Total value of fruits exports in millions of dollars */,
  "veggies_fresh" REAL /* Total value of fresh vegetables exports in millions of dollars */,
  "veggies_processed" REAL /* Total value of processed vegetables exports in millions of dollars */,
  "total_veggies" REAL /* Total value of vegetables exports in millions of dollars */,
  "corn" REAL /* Total value of corn exports in millions of dollars */,
  "wheat" REAL /* Total value of wheat exports in millions of dollars */,
  "cotton" REAL /* Total value of cotton exports in millions of dollars */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is collected */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the data was collected (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate in which the data was collected (e.g., tropical, temperate) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_data_state_code FOREIGN KEY ("state_code") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code (e.g., AL, AK) */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs (e.g., Northeast, Southeast) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state in millions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., beef, pork) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., livestock, fruits) */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Default unit price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "parent_category" INTEGER /* Parent category ID (for hierarchical relationships) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, government) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., agriculture, economics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access in HH:MM:SS format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the report is based on */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version (e.g., researcher, data analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_reply" INTEGER /* Comment ID being replied to (for threaded comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES agricultural_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team leader (a user ID) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team membership */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
